steps: Enter 314 into Wall Safe dial => opens

playerHints.hint: Dial the Wall Safe with the three stamped digits.

steps: Acquire Brass Key from Wall Safe => obtain key item
Use Brass Key on Locked Desk => drawer opens and reveal Folded Paper

playerHints.hint: Take the Brass Key from the Wall Safe.
Use the Brass Key to open the Locked Desk.

steps: Read Folded Paper: letters left to right O A K => OAK
Recall safe digits obtained while solving safe => 314
Concatenate OAK + 314 => OAK314 and enter on hatch keypad

playerHints.hint: Take letters left to right from the Folded Paper.
Combine the letters with the three digits found when solving the safe.
